result.stdout:
Usage: model [options] [command]

Options:
  -s|--settings <SETTINGS>  Settings file to use when generating code. Settings
                            in the file will override arguments on the command
                            line
  -t|--target <TARGET>      Target framework. Defaults to netstandard2.0
  --overwrite               Overwrite
  --verbose                 Verbose
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information

Commands:
  build                     Use DLL components to generate code
  generators                Manage generators

Run 'model [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: model [options] [command]

Options:
  -s|--settings <SETTINGS>  Settings file to use when generating code. Settings
                            in the file will override arguments on the command
                            line
  -t|--target <TARGET>      Target framework. Defaults to netstandard2.0
  --overwrite               Overwrite
  --verbose                 Verbose
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information

Commands:
  build                     Use DLL components to generate code
  generators                Manage generators

Run 'model [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Use DLL components to generate code

Usage: model build [options] <Generator> <SourceModel>

Arguments:
  Generator                         The generator to use.
  SourceModel                       The filename for the source model to use
                                    during code generation.

Options:
  -l|--local-folder <LOCAL_FOLDER>  Path to the locally cached generators
  -m|--model <MODEL>                Model name. If included then the output will
                                    be limited to the specified model
  -o|--output <OUTPUT>              Output folder
  --overwrite                       Overwrite
  -t|--target <TARGET>              Target framework. Defaults to netstandard2.0
  -s|--settings <SETTINGS>          Settings file to use when generating code.
                                    Settings in the file will override arguments
                                    on the command line
  --version <VERSION>               Specific version to use for the generator
  --verbose                         Verbose
  -?|-h|--help                      Show help information

commands.payload:
Use DLL components to generate code

Usage: model build [options] <Generator> <SourceModel>

Arguments:
  Generator                         The generator to use.
  SourceModel                       The filename for the source model to use
                                    during code generation.

Options:
  -l|--local-folder <LOCAL_FOLDER>  Path to the locally cached generators
  -m|--model <MODEL>                Model name. If included then the output will
                                    be limited to the specified model
  -o|--output <OUTPUT>              Output folder
  --overwrite                       Overwrite
  -t|--target <TARGET>              Target framework. Defaults to netstandard2.0
  -s|--settings <SETTINGS>          Settings file to use when generating code.
                                    Settings in the file will override arguments
                                    on the command line
  --version <VERSION>               Specific version to use for the generator
  --verbose                         Verbose
  -?|-h|--help                      Show help information

result.stdout:
Manage generators

Usage: model generators [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  list          List available generators
  update        Update generators

Run 'generators [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Update generators

Usage: model generators update [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  -l|--local-folder <LOCAL_FOLDER>    Path to the locally cached generators
  --overwrite                         Overwrite
  -s|--server-folder <SERVER_FOLDER>  Server path to the host of the generators
  -t|--target <TARGET>                Target framework. Defaults to
                                      netstandard2.0
  -v|--verbose                        Verbose
